prompt: I need a design system for a mobile-first e-commerce app (iOS and Android). The product is a sustainable fashion marketplace targeting young adults aged 18-35. We want something bold, colorful, and eco-conscious feeling. Target frameworks: React Native or Flutter.

assertions.name: includes_color_palette
assertions.description: Response includes a complete color palette with vibrant/eco-conscious colors and hex codes

assertions.name: includes_typography
assertions.description: Response specifies typography system optimized for mobile displays

assertions.name: ecommerce_specific
assertions.description: Response includes e-commerce-specific guidance (product cards, shopping flows, reviews, etc.)

assertions.name: mobile_framework_aware
assertions.description: Response mentions React Native or Flutter specific guidance

assertions.name: target_audience_alignment
assertions.description: Response reflects understanding of target audience (young adults, sustainability-conscious)
